title: Lalmonirhat Heat Wave
lead: Lalmonirhat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.00. This critical weather event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Lalmonirhat are extremely hot with a high temperature. 
 The relative humidity is 76% and the wind speed is 12.7 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 13.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
